description: Composite graphic. A booking-style photo inset (with rounded corners and a thin border) is layered over a faded full-bleed background photograph of a suburban residential street with trees, fences, utility poles and houses under a partly cloudy blue sky. The inset photo shows a young man with dark, voluminous curly hair, a thin mustache and soul patch, looking at the camera against a plain light-gray wall; he wears a dark hooded sweatshirt printed with bowling-pin graphics and the word 'COMMACK.' There is no large headline on this image.
